assessor_1_raw: Support ticket classification design is rigorous. Pre-trained transformer initialization is standard deployment practice. Macro-F1 is correctly aligned with stakeholder objectives. Ablation structure isolates contributions. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Temporal split correctly uses 18/6/12 months, with the longer test window enabling drift detection. Routing queue exclusion prevents label leakage. Equal tuning effort via validation set. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: The four-way ablation (Full, Text-only, Metadata-only, BoW+text+metadata) is unusually rigorous and provides clean decomposition of transformer vs metadata contributions. Verdict: defense_wins.
